title: Auge in Auge - Eine deutsche Filmgeschichte
original_title: Auge in Auge - Eine deutsche Filmgeschichte
overview: This is not merely another film about cinema history; it is a film about the love of cinema, a journey of discovery through over a century of German film history. Ten people working in film today remember their favourite films of yesteryear.
